author: DominicVainMod
content:
Star Atlas UE5 New Update - OUT NOW,Hey everyone! Our big end of year update for Star Atlas is officially live on the Epic Games Store.

Here's what's NEW:  
Added new story-driven single-player experience in Galia,Three New Shooter Weapons (Rocket Launcher, Shockwave Pistol, Shockwave Rifle),High fidelity Exinade racetrack,New Siege (Spaceship PVP Arena) Game Mode,
View the full patch notes here: ⁠🩹┃patch-notes⁠

@everyone
